message:
🌱 Add langflow: ModuleNotFoundError astra_assistants mission (#862)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-7039-modulenotfounderror-module-langflow-base-astra-assistants-util-not",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again",
+    "description": "ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your langflow installation:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```\nLook for the error: `ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found. Please install it and try again` followed by `Langflow shutdown complete`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the error",
+        "description": "Langflow fails to start with a `ModuleNotFoundError` for `langflow.base.astra_assistants.util`. This is caused by a missing or incorrectly packaged module in certain langflow releases."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for ModuleNotFoundError",
+        "description": "The fix ensures the `astra_assistants` module is correctly included in the langflow package. Upgrade to the version that includes this fix:\n```bash\npip install --upgrade langflow\n```\nIf you need a specific version:\n```bash\npip install langflow>=<fixed-version>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm the issue is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by starting langflow:\n```bash\nlangflow run\n```\nConfirm that `ModuleNotFoundError: Module langflow.base.astra_assistants.util not found` no longer appears and langflow starts successfully."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fixed the missing langflow.base.astra_assistants.util module by ensuring it is correctly included in the langflow package distribution.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
